allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ms=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; [print\(m['id'],'|',m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('prompt','?'\),'/', m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('completion','?'\)\) for m in ms if 'stheno' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'sao10k' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'l3' in m['id'].lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ms=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; [print\(m['id'],'|',m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('prompt','?'\),'/', m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('completion','?'\)\) for m in ms if 'magnum' in m['id'].lower\(\)]")

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{IGNORECASE=1} /Pillow Chat/{a++} /Ready when you are/{b++} /typingBounce/{c++} /remembers you/{d++} END{print "Pillow Chat="a" Ready="b" typingBounce="c" remembers="d}' /tmp/landing.html)

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi in exactly 3 words"}]}' -c /tmp/pillow-cookies.txt --max-time 30 -o /tmp/pillow-resp.txt)

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi in exactly 3 words"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Hello there, sweetie."},{"role":"user","content":"and now 5 words"}]}' -b /tmp/pillow-cookies.txt --max-time 30 -o /tmp/pillow-resp2.txt)
